$\begin{array}{l}\text{i. } \sin ^{2} \mathrm{~A}+\sin ^{2} \mathrm{~B}+\sin ^{2} \mathrm{C}+2 \sin \mathrm{A} \sin \mathrm{B} \sin \mathrm{C}=1^{\text {}}\\\text{ii. } \tan (\mathrm{A}+\mathrm{B}-\mathrm{C})=\cot 2 \mathrm{C}\\\text{iii. } \tan A \cdot \tan B+\tan B \tan C+\tan C \cdot \tan A=1\end{array}$

$\begin{array}{l}\text{i. } \operatorname{cot} B \cdot \cot A+\cot B \cdot \cot C+\cot C \cdot \cot A=1\\\text{ii. } \tan A \cdot \tan B+\tan B \cdot \tan C+\tan C \cdot \tan A=1\\\text{iii. } \tan \frac{B}{2} \tan \frac{C}{2}+\tan \frac{C}{2} \tan \frac{A}{2}+\tan \frac{A}{2} \tan \frac{B}{2}=1\end{array}$
